symbols: golden apple — the prize of beauty and source of discord
armor and shield of Athena — wisdom and warfare set aside before beauty
Eros flying above — desire as the force driving Paris's choice
pastoral setting — the shepherd origins of Paris on Mount Ida
three goddesses — the competing claims of power, wisdom, and love
description: A mythological scene set in a verdant landscape depicting the Judgment of Paris. At left, the Trojan prince Paris sits partially draped, holding or presenting the golden apple. Three nude or semi-nude goddesses stand before him: Aphrodite at center, flanked by Hera and Athena. A winged Eros or Cupid flies overhead carrying a wreath. At the lower right, discarded armor, a shield, and a helmet lie on the ground beside a dog. In the background, additional figures populate a distant landscape beneath a cloudy sky.
